name: broadcast-saas-root
description: Raiz do projeto SaaS Broadcast com scripts de deploy centralizados.

scripts.web:build: cd web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.web:deploy-full: npm run web:build && npm run web:deploy
scripts.functions:build: cd functions && npm install && npm run build
scripts.functions:deploy-full: npm run functions:build && npm run functions:deploy
scripts.deploy-all-visual: npm run web:deploy-full && npm run rules:deploy

author: Juliano
